narrative.headline: ⚠ 120 security findings — review before other cleanup. 5727 findings open. Test health (21.3%) needs attention — run `desloppify next` to start. (13 review findings — run `desloppify issues`)

actions.description: 13 review findings need investigation — run `desloppify issues` to see the work queue
12 flat_dirs findings — create subdirectories and use `desloppify move`
29 coupling findings — fix boundary violations with `desloppify move`
227 facade findings — flatten re-export facades or consolidate barrel files
5 uncalled_functions findings — remove dead functions or document why they're retained
775 structural findings — decompose large files — extract logic into focused modules
6 props findings — split bloated components, extract sub-components
157 dupes findings — extract shared utility or consolidate duplicates
291 dict_keys findings — fix dict key mismatches — dead writes are likely dead code, schema drift suggests a typo or missed rename
1629 test_coverage findings — add tests for untested production modules — prioritize by import count
75 responsibility_cohesion findings — split modules with too many responsibilities — extract focused sub-modules
326 boilerplate_duplication findings — extract shared boilerplate into reusable helpers or base classes
403 unused findings — inspect with `desloppify next` and fix manually
1608 smells findings — inspect with `desloppify next` and fix manually
42 global_mutable_config findings — refactor module-level mutable state — use explicit init functions or dependency injection
9 stale_wontfix findings — re-evaluate old wontfix decisions — fix, document, or escalate
120 security findings — review and fix security findings — prioritize by severity
